info.title: FedNet Microblog API
info.description: A simple ActivityPub server for social media: users, follows, federation, and basic admin.

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Administrative endpoints for user and server management

tags.name: Federation
tags.description: ActivityPub federation endpoints for inter-server communication

tags.name: Socials
tags.description: Social graph and interactions (followers, following, liked)

tags.name: Posts
tags.description: ActivityPub endpoints for posts and post interactions (replies, likes, shares)

get.description: Discover user information via WebFinger protocol

400.description: Invalid resource format or domain mismatch

get.description: Retrieve a user's inbox. Requires authentication - you can only view your own inbox. The authenticated user must match the username in the URL path.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Username of the actor. Must match the authenticated user.

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid authentication token

403.description: Forbidden - You can only view your own inbox

message.example: You can only view your own inbox

post.description: Receive an ActivityPub activity from another server (Server-to-Server). Requires HTTP signature verification. The request must include valid HTTP signature headers (Signature, Host, Date, Digest) signed with the sending actor's private key. The signature is verified against the actor's public key fetched from their actor document.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Local username of the recipient actor

schema.description: ActivityPub activity object (e.g., Follow, Accept, Create, etc.)

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing HTTP signature

post.description: Submit an ActivityPub activity to a user's outbox (Client-to-Server). Requires authentication - you can only post to your own outbox. The authenticated user must match the username in the URL path. Supported activity types include Follow, Create (for posts), Like, Announce, and Undo.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Username of the actor. Must match the authenticated user.

actor.description: Actor URL. Must match the authenticated user's actor URL.

object.description: Target object or actor URL for the activity

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid activity or missing required fields

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid authentication token

403.description: Forbidden - You can only post to your own outbox

message.example: You can only post as yourself

get.summary: Get followers collection for a user
Get following collection for a user
Get liked objects collection for a user

get.description: Returns the ActivityPub Note object for a specific post. Includes content, metadata, and links to replies, likes, and shares collections.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Local username of the post author

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Post GUID or full note ID (e.g., 'abc123' or 'http://example.com/u/alice#abc123')

404.description: Post not found or author mismatch

get.description: Returns the Collection of replies to a post. The Discussion - returns reply object URLs.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Local username of the post author

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Post GUID or full note ID

404.description: Post not found or author mismatch

get.description: Returns the Collection of actors who liked the post. The Likers - returns actor URLs.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Local username of the post author

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Post GUID or full note ID

200.description: Collection of actor URLs who liked the post

404.description: Post not found or author mismatch

get.description: Returns the Collection of actors who shared/reposted the post. The Boosters - returns actor URLs.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Local username of the post author

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Post GUID or full note ID

200.description: Collection of actor URLs who shared the post

404.description: Post not found or author mismatch

get.description: Authenticated helper endpoint that asks this server to fetch a remote HTTP(S) resource (for example WebFinger documents, ActivityPub actors, followers collections, or posts) and returns the response back to the client. This avoids CORS issues and lets the server apply its own network and security policies.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Full HTTP(S) URL of the remote resource to fetch.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Optional logical address/handle associated with the request. Forwarded as an X-Requested-Address header for observability.

200.description: Successful proxy response from remote server

schema.description: Remote JSON body. Shape depends on the remote endpoint.
Non-JSON responses are proxied as raw bytes with the original content type.

400.description: Invalid or missing url parameter, or unsupported protocol (only http:// and https:// are allowed)

502.description: Bad gateway - Remote server returned an error or could not be reached

username.description: Unique local username used for login and ActivityPub address

displayName.description: Optional display name shown in clients

inviteToken.description: Required when the server is configured for invite-only registration

422.description: Invite token missing or invalid when invite-only registration is enabled

get.summary: List all users with pagination and filters

registration_mode.description: Whether sign ups are open or require invitation

allow_public_peers.description: Expose public peer list and allow others to discover this server

auto_fetch_peer_links.description: Automatically fetch remote peer links that other servers share

get.summary: List all posts with pagination and filters

get.description: Get a list of all invite tokens created on this server, including their status (unused, used, revoked).

delete.description: Revoke an unused invite token. Cannot revoke tokens that are already used or already revoked.

400.description: Token not found, already used, or already revoked

patch.description: Update the current user's display name and/or summary.

isFollowingPublic.description: Controls whether your following list is visible to others.

post.description: Generate a new invite token. Only works when server registration mode is set to 'invite'.

get.description: Search local users by partial username. Returns a limited set of fields. Requires authentication.

msg.description: Human readable summary of the registration result

is_following_public.description: Whether the user is following the public timeline

created_by.description: Username of the user who created this token

created_at.description: Unix timestamp when the token was created

used_at.description: Unix timestamp when the token was used, null if unused

used_by.description: Username of the user who used this token, null if unused

summary.example: Profile bio that shows on the user page

token.description: The invite token that can be used for registration

created_at.description: Unix timestamp when the token was created
Unix timestamp when the token was created

used_at.description: Unix timestamp when the token was used, null if unused

used_by.description: Username of the user who used this token, null if unused

links.description: Array of links to related resources

type.description: MIME type of the linked resource

href.description: URL of the linked resource (actor endpoint)

bearerAuth.description: JWT token obtained from /api/auth/login. Must be from an admin user.
